title: Copying automations
excerpt: I have 20 or so automations in my tasks board and I need to re-use across boards.  I would like the ability to copy the automations to another board.   The only way I am doing it now is to create a board template and re-…

posts.author: jcorrea (Jose Correa)
posts.cookedHtml: I have 20 or so automations in my tasks board and I need to re-use across boards. I would like the ability to copy the automations to another board. The only way I am doing it now is to create a board template and re-use. This is cumbersome as the board template is not equal across projects, for example I need to remove or add columns depending on the project.
